mnemonics: SCATTER Shows: Correlation, Trends, And Relationships.
keyPoints: Scatter plots visualize the relationship between two continuous variables.
The pattern of points can reveal positive, negative, or no correlation.
They are created in R using the plot() function with the syntax plot(x, y).
commonMistakes: Plotting categorical variables instead of continuous ones, which creates a different chart type.
Forgetting to label axes, making the plot uninterpretable.
Overplotting, where too many points obscure the underlying pattern and trend.
